g.text: Th1/Th2 signature scores NULL for the core ERV-silencing enzymes

text.style: font-size: 11.5px; font-family: 'DejaVu Sans', 'Bitstream Vera Sans', 'Computer Modern Sans Serif', 'Lucida Grande', 'Verdana', 'Geneva', 'Lucid', 'Arial', 'Helvetica', 'Avant Garde', sans-serif; fill: #111111

g.text: (SETDB1, ATF7IP, PPHLN1, TASOR: n.s. all conditions) — only pleiotropic TRIM28 and the off-ERV control SUV39H2 move Th2, in opposite directions

text.style: font-size: 7.5px; font-family: 'DejaVu Sans', 'Bitstream Vera Sans', 'Computer Modern Sans Serif', 'Lucida Grande', 'Verdana', 'Geneva', 'Lucid', 'Arial', 'Helvetica', 'Avant Garde', sans-serif; text-anchor: start; fill: #888888

g.text: Ticks R/8h/48h = Rest / Stim-8h / Stim-48h. Bold = core H3K9me3/ERV-silencing module; SUV39H1/2 (right of black line) = off-ERV mechanistic comparators.

text.style: font-size: 7.5px; font-family: 'DejaVu Sans', 'Bitstream Vera Sans', 'Computer Modern Sans Serif', 'Lucida Grande', 'Verdana', 'Geneva', 'Lucid', 'Arial', 'Helvetica', 'Avant Garde', sans-serif; text-anchor: start; fill: #888888

g.text: Module score = mean(Th1 log₂FC) − mean(Th2 log₂FC); >0 = predicted Th1-up/Th2-down. Stars: two-sided permutation p (** <0.01, * <0.05). No core enzyme reaches significance; TRIM28 (pleiotropic) and SUV39H2 (control) are the only movers.
